violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. In hot water mechanical WAREWASHING operations, an irreversible registering temperature indicator shall be provided and readily accessible for measuring the UTENSIL surface temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2023

The ceiling in the back storage area was observed to have ceiling tiles removed and leaving an open space to the ceiling/roof structure above. Ceiling tiles are to be replaced. (Per the PIC, the water heater on the shelf above the mop sink was replaced within the last several months. New Water heater appears to be taller than the drop ceiling height.) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2024
